faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my North Bergen property?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are aggressive when defending their nests and can sting multiple times, unlike honeybees. They're particularly dangerous for people with allergies and can become hostile when nests are disturbed. North Bergen's outdoor dining areas and parks make professional removal essential for public safety.
